'''Capital Square''' was a location in [[Iridonia/Legends|Iridonia's]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Malidris]].

==History==
The square could be viewed from a building used to house ambassadors to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]].

{{Loc-stub}}

==Appearances==
*{{Tales|17|Phantom Menaces}}
